structure.description: Sidebar/nav разделяется на ≥2 группы: Pinned/Favorites (user-curated subset), Shared/Teamspace (visible to others), Private (owner-only). Те же entity-records, sectionning по permission/visibility.

rationale.hypothesis: Flat list of N>20 entities без visual hierarchy убивает discoverability; semantic sections по pinned-status и visibility-scope дают O(1) frequency-based access без вынуждения user'а сортировать вручную.

counterexample.description: Single project list, sectionning через filters не сегменты

shouldMatch.reason: Page hierarchy + Permission level → pinned/shared/private split

shouldNotMatch.reason: Position не имеет pinned-flag и visibility-scope
